notes: v1.1.9: AI開発室のGitHub Issue自動実装パイプラインを追加。doPost経由でGitHub Actionsからclaim/complete/reportPushedを呼べるようにし、Issue作成→Claude Code実装→自己レビュー→commit/push→manifest更新→DEPLOY_WAITINGまでを自動化。本番Deployは引き続き人間が更新センターから手動実行。

files.source:
<style>
:root{--bg:#f4f6fb;--card:#fff;--text:#162033;--muted:#6b7280;--pri:#1d4ed8;--line:#e5e7eb;--danger:#dc2626}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;background:var(--bg);font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;color:var(--text)}.hidden{display:none!important}.login-wrap{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px}.brand-card{width:min(420px,100%);background:var(--card);border-radius:28px;padding:28px;box-shadow:0 20px 50px #0001}.logo{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#06b6d4);color:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:900;font-size:32px}h1,h2,h3{margin:.2em 0 .6em}label{display:block;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin:12px 0 6px}input,select,textarea{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:13px;background:#fff;font-size:16px}button{border:0;border-radius:14px;padding:12px 14px;font-weight:700;background:#e5e7eb;color:var(--text)}button.primary{background:var(--pri);color:#fff;width:100%;margin-top:16px}.ghost{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line)}.app{padding:72px 14px 92px;max-width:980px;margin:0 auto}.topbar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:58px;background:#ffffffcc;backdrop-filter:blur(14px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;z-index:5;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}#versionBadge{display:block;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}.page{display:none}.page.active{display:block}.grid{display:grid;gap:10px}.cards{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.card,.panel{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;padding:16px;margin:10px 0;box-shadow:0 8px 20px #00000008}.card span{display:block;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}.card b{font-size:28px}.card small,.muted{color:var(--muted)}.small{font-size:12px}.item-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin:10px 0}.item-grid .item{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:10px}.list{display:grid;gap:8px}.row{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;align-items:center}.row small{color:var(--muted)}.row .danger{color:var(--danger)}.filter{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}.actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}.actions button{flex:1}.tabbar{position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:76px;background:#fff;border-top:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;justify-content:space-around;padding:8px 4px env(safe-area-inset-bottom);z-index:5}.tabbar button{background:transparent;padding:4px;font-size:20px;min-width:52px}.tabbar span{display:block;font-size:10px;margin-top:2px}#toast{position:fixed;top:70px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#111827;color:#fff;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:999px;z-index:99;display:none;max-width:90%;text-align:center}@media(min-width:760px){.cards{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}.item-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}.filter{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}}
.debug-box{white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:180px;overflow:auto;background:#111827;color:#d1fae5;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:11px;text-align:left}
</style>
<style>
.release-notes{margin-top:8px;padding:8px;border-radius:12px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--line);font-size:12px;line-height:1.6}
button.danger{background:#fee2e2;color:#b91c1c}
.status-badge{display:inline-block;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}
.status-WAITING{background:#e5e7eb;color:#374151}
.status-WORKING{background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8}
.status-REVIEW{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e}
.status-DONE{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d}
.status-FAILED{background:#fee2e2;color:#b91c1c}
.status-PUSHED{background:#ede9fe;color:#6d28d9}
.status-DEPLOY_WAITING{background:#e2e8f0;color:#334155}
.status-DEPLOYED{background:#ccfbf1;color:#0f766e}
.ai-dev-card{background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:12px;display:grid;gap:6px}
.ai-dev-card b{font-size:15px}
.ai-dev-card p{margin:0;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word}
.ai-dev-card small{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6}
.ai-dev-meta{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--line)}
</style>
<style>
.page-title-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:8px}.page-title-row h2{margin-bottom:2px}.input-panel{padding-bottom:88px}.input-basic-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}.input-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin:14px 0 8px}.input-toolbar b{display:block}.input-toolbar small{display:block}.compact-actions button{padding:9px 10px;font-size:13px}.item-grid.enhanced{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:10px}.input-card{padding:12px}.input-card.required{border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff}.item-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px}.item-head label{margin:0;color:var(--text);font-weight:800}.item-head small{font-size:11px;color:var(--pri);background:#dbeafe;border-radius:999px;padding:3px 7px}.step-input{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(44px,56px) minmax(0,1fr) minmax(44px,56px);gap:8px;align-items:center}.step-input button{min-height:44px;padding:0;font-size:22px;border-radius:12px;touch-action:manipulation}.step-input input{min-height:44px;text-align:center;font-size:18px;font-weight:800;padding:10px 8px;min-width:0;touch-action:manipulation;pointer-events:auto;-webkit-user-select:text;user-select:text;line-height:1.2}.step-input input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,.step-input input::-webkit-inner-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none;margin:0}.step-input input[type=number]{-moz-appearance:textfield}.save-sticky{position:sticky;bottom:84px;z-index:4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;background:#ffffffee;backdrop-filter:blur(14px);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:18px;padding:10px 12px;box-shadow:0 12px 34px #0002;margin-top:14px}.save-sticky b{display:block;font-size:16px}.save-sticky button.primary{width:auto;min-width:132px;margin:0}button:disabled{opacity:.65}.input-page .panel h3{margin-bottom:10px}@media(max-width:759px){.step-input{grid-template-columns:46px minmax(0,1fr) 46px}.step-input input{font-size:18px}}@media(min-width:760px){.item-grid.enhanced{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.input-basic-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)}.save-sticky{bottom:88px}}
</style>
